zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Lister於1551年3月29日出生在英國越可爾哈利法可時，她的父親William Lister39歲，母親Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England27歲。她於1570年之前與William John Ham結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1576年5月23日在英國英格蘭越可爾享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Lister于1551年3月29日出生在英国越可爾哈利法可时，她的父亲William Lister39岁，母亲Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England27岁。她于1570年之前与William John Ham结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1576年5月23日在英国英格兰越可爾享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Lister was born on 29 March 1551, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, her father, William Lister, was 39 and her mother, Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England, was 27. She married William John Ham before 1570. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 23 May 1576, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Lister est née le 29 mars 1551, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Lister, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William John Ham avant 1570. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 23 mai 1576, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Lister am 29. März 1551 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Lister 39 und ihre Mutter Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England 27. Sie hat vor 1570 William John Ham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 23. Mai 1576 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Lister è nata il il 29 marzo 1551 nel Halifax, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William Lister, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato William John Ham prima del 1570. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 23 maggio 1576, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Listerが1551年3月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスで生まれた時，父William Listerは39歳，母Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, Englandは27歳であった。1570年以前にWilliam John Hamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1576年5月23日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Lister(이)가 1551년 3월 29일 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Lister(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1570년 이전 William John Ham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1576년 5월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.29 March 1551–23 May 1576: 29 de março de 1551–23 de maio de 1576
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Lister nasceu em 29 de março de 1551, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Lister, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com William John Ham antes 1570. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 23 de maio de 1576, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Lister родилась 29 марта 1551 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Lister было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William John Ham перед 1570 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 23 мая 1576 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет.

es.29 March 1551–23 May 1576: 29 de marzo de 1551–23 de mayo de 1576
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Lister nació el 29 de marzo de 1551, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Lister, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England, tenía 27 años. Se casó con William John Ham antes de 1570. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1576, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 25 años.
